creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sheldon Hearn wrote:

> On Mon, 04 Sep 2000 17:55:10 +0300, Maxim Sobolev wrote:
>
> > I see. BTW, the name of variable is just plain wrong, which can cause
> > confusion. How about the following patch?
>
> The patch looks good.  Let me know once it's been tested for the
> WITH_GTK case and I'll commit it.  You can commit it yourself if you
> prefer.

Yes, I tested it and it works just fine. After looking at the port more closely
I found that other improvement is possible - the port should use libintl from
ports instead of building its own version. Furthermore, there is a problem with
PLIST, because the port tries to remove ${PREFIX}/share/locale/* directories,
which usually may be shared among several installed ports, thus should be kept
intact. The following patch is expected to solve those problems.

-Maxim
